title: Heartbeat scan — docker configs and systemd units

log.context: Heartbeat scan — docker configs and systemd units

Heartbeat scan complete. Here's what was found and fixed:

**Issues found and fixed (both minor/ops):**

1. **`commons-server.service` missing crash alert** — `ExecStopPost=/mnt/data/scripts/service-crash-alert.sh %n` was present on cloudflared, clunger, and temporal-worker, but missing from commons-server. Added it so commons-server crashes will surface as Discord notifications.

2. **`clunger/src/index.ts` server callback had no top-level error boundary** — The `http.createServer()` async call...(truncated)
